PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?episode wdt:P179 wd:Q34316 ; rdfs:label ?label ; wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(regex(?label , "Tenth Planet" , "i"))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?date)
LIMIT 1
